name: telegram-connector
description: First-party Telegram connector reference app for the canonical Deno app framework.

tools.name: connector_status
tools.description: Report connector mode, health, and canonical connector-session posture.

tools.name: sync_updates
tools.description: Normalize Telegram updates and submit them to the canonical communication gateway ingress path.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Request canonical gateway egress dispatch for one Telegram message.

tools.name: acknowledge_escalation
tools.description: Submit a canonical acknowledgement token for escalation continuity.

bot_token.label: Bot Token
bot_token.description: Telegram bot token stored in the credential vault.

bot_username.label: Bot Username
bot_username.description: Optional Telegram bot username for mention handling.

default_account_id.label: Default Account Id
default_account_id.description: Canonical account id used for connector registration.

client_api_hash.label: Client API Hash
client_api_hash.description: Optional Telegram full-client API hash stored in the vault.

client_phone_number.label: Client Phone Number
client_phone_number.description: Optional Telegram phone number used for full-client validation.
